name: Sort
comment:
Useful ways to combine sorters.

@docs Sorter, all, and, by, custom, equal, float, int, list, order, reverse, string

unions.name: Sorter
unions.comment: A sorter which produces an `Order` between values.

values.name: all
values.comment: Combine a list of sorters, defering to those earlier in the list.

values.name: and
values.comment: Combine sorters, defering to the second sorter.
values.type: Sort.Sorter a -> Sort.Sorter a -> Sort.Sorter a

values.name: custom
values.comment: For when you need to handroll a sorter!

values.name: list
values.comment: Order a list with given sorter.
values.type: Sort.Sorter a -> List.List a -> List.List a

values.name: order
values.comment: Order two elements according to a sorter.

values.name: reverse
values.comment: Reverse the order of a sorter.
